ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "roi_name" TEXT /* Name of the region of interest (ROI) analyzed */,
  "conscious_state" TEXT /* State of consciousness during the experiment (e.g., conscious, unconscious) */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number for cross-validation or similar analysis */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study the dataset is part of */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific experiment within the study */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., MRI, fMRI) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the dataset (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset this metric belongs to */,
  "mean_variance" REAL /* Mean variance calculated for the dataset */,
  "best_variance" REAL /* Best variance calculated for this dataset */,
  "positive_voxels" INTEGER /* Number of positive voxels identified */,
  "weight_sum" REAL /* Sum of weights associated with the analysis */,
  "n_parameters" INTEGER /* Total number of parameters considered in this analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Statistical method used (e.g., ANOVA, t-test) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metrics */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for significance testing */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser information) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator responsible for the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roi_descriptions" (
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region of interest */,
  "roi_name" TEXT /* Name of the region of interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region of interest */,
  "anatomical_location" TEXT /* Anatomical location of the ROI */,
  "functional_role" TEXT /* Functional role of the ROI */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to literature or sources for the ROI description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the experiment belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., behavioral, imaging) */,
  "stimulus" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus used */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol followed in the experiment */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used in the experiment */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data collected (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the update (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_updates_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Log of activities performed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
